titleStmt.title: SII 16.198: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 198. (A.R. No. 157 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPŪR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the antarāḷa-maṇḍapa of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Kārtika śu. 12, Utthānadvādaśi, regularly corresponding to 1554 A.D., November 6, (Tuesday), °54.

It records a gift of the village Nāgulavaram, on the banks of the Guṇḍakamma, in Dūpāṭi-sīma for celebrating the 12 saṅkrāntis in the year in the temple of Chennakēśava by Timmaraju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Kōnēṭayya, who is said to have obtained Dūpāṭi-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king. It is also stated that a fourth share of the offerings due to the dharmakartta was granted to Śrīraṅgāchārya, son of Kandāḷa Bhāvanāchārya of Vādhūla-gōtra, and to his descendants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmatē rāmānujāya namaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varuṣaṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭi Ānaṁdasaṁvatsara kārtika śu 12 lu śrīmadrājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāśivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhā sanārūḍhulaiṁpṛthivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhilalō
kārādhyulaina śrīmārakāpuraṁ śrīcanakēśavarāyala divya śrīpādapadmaṁbulaku śrīma nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju kōnēṭayya kunūruṁḍu tiṁmmarāju daṁḍaṁ samarppiṁcci yi
cina bhūdāna dharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu mā nāyaṁkarānaku sadāśivarāyalu pāliṁcina dūpāṭi śīmalōni guṁḍakaṁmmadari nāgulavaraṁgrāmaṁ paṁḍreṁḍu sa
ṁkrāṁttula mahōtsavālakunu dhāravōśi samarpistimi yī saṁkrāṁttula mahōtsavāla yaṁdu kōnēṭi tīramaṁdu svāmīvēṁcēśi Āragiṁcina padārthālavallanu dharma
kartāṁśaṁ cāturbhāgaṁmu śrīmadvādhūlagōtrōdbhavulaina kaṁdāḷa bhāvanācāryulayya vāri kumāḷlu śrīraṁgācāryulayyavāri divyaśrīcaraṇāraviṁdamulaku dēvara dā
suṁḍu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju kōnēṭayya komāruṁḍu timarāju daṁḍamu samarpiṁci tathātithi vuthānadvādaśipuṇyakālamaṁdu sahiraṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvaka
mugānu dhāravōśi yistimi gāna dēvaravāri putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkamu gānu Anubhaviṁpaṁgalavāru . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupālanaṁ . dā
nātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . śrīśrīśrīṁjēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
